feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Community
feed.subtitle: SAP Community Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: 手形と前受/前払金の特殊仕訳取引が定義されていませんMsg 番号 FP030
FBRA Error: 'Document XXXXXXXXX is not purely a clearing document,
entry.content:
An error was encountered in FBRA: 'Document XXXXXXXXX is not purely a clearing document,' and no further details were provided in the error message.

Here's what happened:

  1. The user posted a customer payment document through F-28.
  2. They manually allocated the payment to two DR documents as full payment.
  3. Due to the erroneous posting of the DZ document, the user needed to reverse the clearing document through FBRA, but the above error was encountered.

Could you please help us resolve this error and explain what triggered it?

Thanks

entry.title: Inquiry on Linkage Between "Activate Advanced Valuation" and "Define Alternative Reconciliation"
entry.content:
Hi SAP Community,

I hope this message finds you well.

I'm currently working on configuring SAP and have come across two specific areas that I need some clarification on:

  1. 103315_Activate Advanced Valuation – I understand this configuration is related to handling of complex valuation scenarios like Balance Sheet Reclassification, Impairment, Foreign Currency Valuations and Discounting of Receivables and Payables.

  2. 102631_Define Alternative Reconciliation – This configuration seems to pertain to setting up alternative reconciliation methods by assigning an alternative reconciliation account if we want to reconcile some transactions differently from the normal business.

My question is whether these two configurations are interconnected or if they operate independently. Specifically:

  • Are there any dependencies between "Activate Advanced Valuation" and "Define Alternative Reconciliation"?
  • Could changes or settings in one configuration impact the other?
  • Are there best practices or considerations when configuring these two areas together?

To share an example: I have assigned an alternative reconciliation account to the target account mentioned in the Advanced Valuation configuration, but the document is still being posted to the target account specified when I am running the general ledger job for post-balance sheet reclassification. I am attaching some screenshots to illustrate the issue:

Any insights or experiences you can share would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you in advance for your help!

Best regards,
CA Amar Modanwal.

entry.title: Fiori Launchpad - Display one Fiori group per tab in
entry.content:
Hello,

We want to show only one group in one tab on main page but it shows all groups as list and scrolls down when user click group tab. We did configuration as the screenshot below but Main Page still shows all groups in one page.

But if we change user setting to "Show one group at a time" , the page works as we want perfectly. How can we set this setting for all users?

Thanks.

entry.title: Cross-company stock transfer: Condition P101 in billing document twice
entry.content:
Dear gurus,

we do cross company stock transfer orders (STO). The process works just fine, but we came along one strange thing:

For billing, we defined a pricing procedure similar to standard ICAA01, but with just one (!) price condition, condition type P101. Price source was set to A (Purchase Order) to copy the condition value for P101 from the STO to the billing document.

Now, when we create a billing document, there are two (!) rows for condition type P101.

 

The first one is marked red (incorrect), it has a value of zero. Further values:
Condition class: B Prices
Calculat.Type: C Quantity
Condit.Category: H Basic price
Cond.Control: A Adjust for quantity variance
Condit.Origin: A Automatic Pricing
Inactive: X Inactive vie formulas or incorrect

 

The second P101 works just as planned, the condition value is copied from the STO and Price Source is A (Purchase order). Further values:
Condition class: B Prices
Calculat.Type: C Quantity
Condit.Category: G Internal price
Cond.Control: H Condition value fixed (cost price)
Condit.Origin: A Automatic Pricing

Now my questions: Why is the first row generated and why is it incorrect?

Any ideas?

Thanks
Jens

entry.title: When I use BDC TO CALL TRANSACTION VA05,There are NO data return in internal table：lt_message
entry.content:
My code are as follow：
  DATA: ctu_parameters TYPE ctu_params.
  ctu_parameters-dismode = 'N'.  "后台更新模式
  ctu_parameters-updmode = 'S'.  "同步更新
  ctu_parameters-racommit = 'X'. "No abortion by COMMIT WORK 
CALL TRANSACTION 'VA05' USING bdcdata[] OPTIONS FROM ctu_parameters
     MESSAGES INTO lt_message .

And then i change the code as follow，It still doesn't take effect
 *  DATA: ctu_parameters TYPE ctu_params.
*  ctu_parameters-dismode = 'N'.  "后台更新模式
*  ctu_parameters-updmode = 'L'.  "后台更新
*  ctu_parameters-defsize = 'X'.  "默认大小
*  ctu_parameters-racommit = 'X'. "No abortion by COMMIT WORK
*  ctu_parameters-nobinpt = 'X'. "批输入处理活动
*  ctu_parameters-nobiend = 'X'. "批输入处理活动

entry.title: Former user
entry.content:
hi
I had a lot of blogs that I wrote in the past and now they are all associated with Former user? How can I transfer them to my user?

https://community.sap.com/t5/user/viewprofilepage/user-id/182675

Naor

entry.title: Possibility to introduce retry mechanism for REST API failures in ECC
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

Hope you are doing great!!

I have a request to apply retry mechanism in SAP ECC to automatically re-process failed API messages (REST HTTP calls). Today using Custom FMs we build and call the HTTPS link to Middleware API endpoint (not CPI) which in turn passes the data to Target. We primarily use Output types to extract data and pass it in JSON format through the HTTPS call. So, failure messages are not logged at a single place in SAP today and is stored in Output processing logs in transactional level. 

I'm thinking of storing the failures with document numbers in a custom table and use a separate program to re-trigger all through Batch runs.

I'm looking for some advice on any better/alternative solutions I can implement considering the fact that the number of failures can be in thousands sometimes when Middleware is down for longer period of time.

Regards,

NRK

entry.title: S4 HANA Floor Price Setting
entry.content:
I have been asked to investigate whether it is possible to achieve the following user scenario in my company's S4 HANA Cloud system: 

[Company] wants to give the Regional Sales Managers more flexiblity in quoting for customers, while ensuring our order processing teams are not going below margin when pricing up these Sales Orders. 

Ideally each region will have a price that order processors cannot go below when doing any pricing adjustments. This needs to consider that every customer in has a set % discount (ranging from 30-70%) applied to the Sales Organisation's PPR0 as well. 

Should the sale price be adjusted below this bare minimum, the user would be notified/unable to continue processing the sales order. CBXN (free of charge) transactions would be the exception. 

I have done some preliminary searching and was hoping the Community had seen similar business requirements and had some luck in achieving this or a similar requirement. 

Any and all help / pointers would be greatly appreciated. 

Many thanks, 
MaryAnne

entry.title: what is WOL ID? (in HANA)
entry.content:
Dear community, 

What is WOL ID in HANA? where to find technical resources about that. Please help to understand more. Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Asset - Error oData – OrderTypes
entry.content:
I'm configuring the ASSET environment to use PM, carrying out the documentation I got an oData error that I can't follow.

Error in the application log

I'BTP event log.

 

Have any of your colleagues experienced this type of problem and could provide guidance?

entry.title: BADI FIN_TRV_REQUEST_ONSAVE for Fiori app "Travel request for Travel assistant" not stopping
entry.content:
Hi ,

I have added an additional field in Travel Request for assistant through CFL and implemented a BADI "FIN_TRV_REQUEST_ONSAVE" for validation at the time of save. Issue is, it is not stopping the user even added type 'E' message in ct_messages.

ls_message-type = 'E'. "Warning Message
ls_message-id = '56'.
ls_message-number = '840'.
ls_message-message_v1 = 'This is a test for BAdI Extensibility '.
ls_message-message = 'This is a test for BAdI Extensibility '.
APPEND ls_message TO ct_messages.

I have also tried to use "cx_ble_runtime_error" exception still it is not stopping. Please help or let me know if I need to add any more code in this .

entry.title: Campo MaterialType no Service Layer do Business One
entry.content:
Bom dia pessoal, tudo bom?

Estou iniciando desenvolvimento utilizando o Service Layer do Business One 10.0, edição HANA.

Analisando os dados da entidade Items, encontrei um desencontro de daods e não sei se o problema é da base de dados que temos instalada, ou se é hard-coded na aplicação.

Na tela de Cadastro de Item aba Geral, tem um campo chamado Tipo de Material (quando a Classificação de Itens para Imposto é selcionada como Material e não como Serviço).

Acontece que, quando seleciono um tipo na interface, o valor que o Service Layer me traz está desencontrado em alguns casos (importantes). Segue uma tabela com as correspondências:

Tipo, na Interface
MaterialType, no Service Layer
Valor esperadoAvaliação
0 - Mercadoria para Revenda
mt_GoodsForReseller
mt_GoodsForReseller
✔️
1 - Matéria-prima
mt_FinishedGoods
mt_RawMaterial
✖️
2 - Embalagem
mt_GoodsInProcess
mt_Package
✖️
3 - Mercadorias em processo
mt_RawMaterial
mt_GoodsInProcess
✖️
4 - Produtos acabados
mt_Package
mt_FinishedGoods
✖️
5 - Subproduto
mt_SubProduct
mt_SubProduct
✔️
6 - Produto Intermediário
mt_IntermediateMaterial
mt_IntermediateMaterial
✔️
7 - Material de Uso e Consumo
mt_ConsumerMaterial
mt_ConsumerMaterial
✔️
8 - Ativo Imobilizado
mt_FixedAsset
mt_FixedAsset
✔️
9 - Serviços
mt_Service
mt_Service
✔️
10 - Outros insumos
mt_OtherInput
mt_OtherInput
✔️
99 - Outras
mt_Other
mt_Other
✔️

Segue exemplo:

Alguém já trabalhou com esses dados e pode me ajudar?

Obrigado,

Arão

entry.title: Typing over SAP delivered Return Reasons
entry.content:
Hi SAP Community,

To assist with Reporting and to improve User-friendliness, we are wanting to make the options contained in the 'Return Reason' list more detailed.

Since we are unable to Delete the SAP delivered reasons (or control visibility in the same way as Order Reasons), are we instead able to Type over these SAP descriptions?  Does anyone see any potential issue with this?

We would rather type over existing Reasons than create new ones since that would blow the list out to 16 total options. 

(It might be useful to point out that none of these Reasons are used in Price Determination.)

I appreciate your help.

 

Thank you!

entry.title: SCC1N Usage - Simple Way
entry.content:
SCC1N Usage

SCC1N - Client Copy through Transport

This tool should be launched in Target System/Client ONLY. It cannot be used from source/any other system.

1. Provide list of Transports to be import in proper sequence. Tool will blindly follow sequence.

2. Select Transport Type. If there are multiple types, select all types using multiple selection button.

3. If Source and Target systems are same (within same system, but different client), leave target system field. Else, select it from selection options.

4. Select Source System is it is different (ex: moving from Dev to Prod). If not, leave it blank.

5. Select 'Local Import/Export Update Time' under 'Export/Import time' option. Select 45 days before date & time (must). Do NOT select Source System date/time.

6. Select Source Client of Transport Requests (import same source client TRs only. Bundle them using excel if needed).

7. Select all Target Clients using multiple selection option.

8. Leave ALL OTHER OPTIONS BLANK without any values.

9. ENSURE ALL VALUES & DETAILS ARE PROPERLY CHECKED before execution. One wrong input / selection can ruin whole system. You can try "TEST MODE" first, in case required.

10. Import log can be found in SCC3 like below:
Finished 100 200 1 N/A 00:01:17 Multiple(6) 10.09.2024 13:30:44 XRAMA

Thank you,
Gopagani Ramakrishna
SAP Solution Architect
Hyderabad, India.

entry.title: Could not join any group
entry.content:
Hi Team, I am a new joiner and would like to join the starter SAP community but could not. Could someone help to resolve it? 

Many thanks.

entry.title: ME3L % Consumed Calculation
entry.content: How is the % consumed displayed in ME3L calculated, and in what tables are the numbers used in the calculation stored?

entry.title: PGI and PGR Automation for the completed Sales orders & Delivery orders
entry.content:
Hi Experts

I’m working on a business scenario and would appreciate any insights or experiences from the community. Here’s the process flow we are trying to achieve with complete automation. This scenario applies only to virtual orders; the same order types are used for virtual and nonvirtual processes.

  1. Return Sales Order Creation:

   - Create a return delivery order and assign the serial number (which is picked from a customized field in the sales order).

   - Post Goods Receipt (PGR) after assigning the serial number.

  1. Stock Allocation:

   - Upon PGR (From step 1), allocate the returned stock to the virtual sales order automatically.

  1. Order Completion and Delivery:

   - Virtual sales order is complete, and a delivery order will automatically be created.

   - Assign the serial number again and post goods issue (PGI) automatically.

Has anyone encountered a similar scenario? If so, how did you implement it? Looking forward to any suggestions or solutions.

entry.title: Posting Folders From Open Connectors to AWS S3 Bucket
entry.content:
Hello,

Please suggest, How I Post Folders to AWS S3 Bucket using Open Connectors. Authentication is done and also I have a instance but I do not understand how I Execute to send Folder. Please suggest.

entry.title: SAP ECC 6 EHP 7 FInance Closing period Restriction setup and configuration
entry.content: During Month End Closing, need to allow Finance Users to make adjustments that impact FI records, but restrict the rest of the users to update anything that impact the FI records. How can I do it ?
